title: MaxMoveDist Property
description: Sets or returns the maximum distance of move during calibration.
notes:
Limits distance of arm move during calibration.
  Distance of arm move is not restricted when this is set to 0.

Values

Real value from 0 to 500 (Unit: mm)

Default: 200
see_also:
Applies To

Vision Calibration
 Property

VCal

VDefSetMotionRange Statement
